description_long: This is a medium-sized bottle with a teal blue body and a wide, cylindrical shape that tapers slightly toward the neck. The bottle features a prominent purple and gold label wrapped around its midsection, with some stylized text and symbols visible, including a circular emblem and a possible warning or branding icon. The neck is capped with a metallic-looking, silver-colored closure that appears to be tightly sealed. The bottle sits on a black, rounded base that provides stability and a slight elevation from the ground. The surface of the bottle is glossy, reflecting light, and the material appears to be glass or a similar hard, translucent substance. There are no visible signs of damage or wear, and the bottle appears clean and intact.
description: A teal blue bottle with a purple and gold label, capped with a silver metallic closure and set on a black base. The bottle is glossy, hard, and appears to be made of glass.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main label with stylized text and a circular emblem, as well as the silver cap and black base.
description_view_1: This view highlights the label's text and design, with the bottle's curvature and teal color clearly visible.
description_view_2: The label's iconography, including a possible warning symbol, is most visible from this angle, along with the bottle's smooth surface.
description_view_3: Back view reveals the label's rear section, with less text and more of the bottle's teal body exposed.
attribute_label_or_branding: The bottle has a purple and gold label with stylized text, a circular emblem, and a possible warning or branding icon. The label wraps around the midsection of the bottle.
